items.body:
No API design or tooling issues found. The `@azure/arm-apimanagement` package version `11.0.0-beta.1` is consistent across `package.json`, `src/api/apiManagementContext.ts`, and `CHANGELOG.md`. The changelog correctly compares against the previous stable release (`10.0.0`), no alpha versions are present, and all changed review files are submodule-scoped (`arm-apimanagement-api-*-node.api.md`) and excluded from review per guidelines. The main `review/arm-apimanagement-node.api.md` was not modified in this PR.
